description: Scripted mirror of the MEASURED Experiment 006 behavior: the model calls the calculator with a schema-valid but grammatically unsupported expression ('2 ** 0.5'). Schema validation passes; execution fails → runtime outcome tool-error. Used as the tool-calling lesson's deterministic fallback when the live 006 trace is unavailable.

respond.text: I'll compute the square root with the calculator.

turns.teaching: The arguments are a valid string (schema layer passes) — but the calculator's grammar has no '**', so execution fails. Valid shape, unexecutable meaning.
